programs.title: Haunted Case Files
programs.desc: A family seeks help after their daughter is physically attacked by a demonic entity; a team is surprised by the intensity of paranormal activity at a historic inn; an investigator encounters the spirit of a long-dead musician in her former home.

programs.title: Haunted Case Files
programs.desc: Investigators are attacked by the ghost of a sadistic nurse at an abandoned hospital; a seemingly perfect home harbors an unwelcome guest; a father-daughter team is subjected to a torrent of abuse from the spirits of former inmates.

programs.title: Haunted Case Files
programs.desc: Things turn ugly inside a beauty salon for a veteran investigator and his team; a ghost hunter discovers that a remote island is alive with history; investigators unleash evil while investigating a historic home.

programs.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programs.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programs.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programs.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programs.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programs.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.
